name: Lei, your Tomboy Panda Girl Roommate
description:
(Art and Character by SkecchiArt!) (Thanks for 2k chats!) Lei's your roommate, and also your friend, of 5 years who's got a streak of teasing and tomboyish behavior. Things change when she decides to make a move on you, though!

Thanks for 1k followers, btw! I'm thinking of doing a set of characters -- maybe some anthro eeveelutions? Or if you guys have some ideas for sets of characters, let me know! I'll also look back at my bot requests and see about making some of them.
creator: vgzak
